claim_boundary: Ticket 92 proves one Collatz coordinate/no-go correction and repairs one Twin Prime threshold artifact; none of the four open problems is solved.

attempts.attempt: Check that normalization preserves the additive or sign-scale event actually required by the theorem before importing an asymptotic estimate.

bounded_result.candidate_theorem: Preserve the unnormalized zero-free-region defect needed for an all-height sign theorem.

attempts.obstruction: No target-specific second-order coordinate or infinite recurrence theorem was proved.
attempts.candidate_theorem: Preserve the unnormalized zero-free-region defect needed for an all-height sign theorem.
attempts.next_experiment: Derive the smallest unnormalized defect whose recurrence is equivalent to the target theorem.
attempts.claim_boundary: No riemann proof and no certified riemann counterexample.

attempts.proof_or_counterexample_mode: exact second-order approximation coordinate plus target-erasing normalization no-go
attempts.attempt: Test whether standard p-adic approximation exponents can detect the constant two-bit event isolated by TICKET91.

exact_second_order_coordinate.prefix: At consecutive top-bit heights H<J, let k=r_H and L=J-H-1.
exact_second_order_coordinate.target_equivalence: The 100 event is equivalent to Delta_H>=3 and to exponential valuation excess >=5.

first_order_scale_no_go.collapse: For every fixed additive defect Delta_H=O(1), mu_H tends to 1; Delta=1 and the required Delta>=3 have the same first-order limit.
first_order_scale_no_go.countermodel: The aperiodic square-coded concatenation of 10 and 110 avoids 00, has Delta in {1,2}, and still has mu_H->1.
first_order_scale_no_go.linear_forms_boundary: Upper bounds v2(3^(k+1)+7)<=C log k do not force a lower recurrence of Delta_H>=3.
first_order_scale_no_go.transcendence_boundary: Transcendence or an irrationality exponent does not preserve the constant additive bits needed by the target.

proof_chain: Use the next nonzero bit J to compute the exact 2-adic distance from R to its positive prefix k.
Subtract H=floor(log2(k)) before normalizing, preserving the constant digit information as Delta_H.
Identify the missing 00 event exactly with Delta_H>=3.
Show that dividing by H sends every bounded Delta_H to the same limit one and therefore erases the target distinction.
Exhibit an explicit aperiodic no-00 sequence with the same normalized approximation exponent limit.
Reject standard first-order approximation-exponent and upper-bound linear-form routes for this constant-additive target.

discarded_routes.counteredge: Every bounded digit defect has the same exponent limit one.
An upper bound cannot force infinitely many lower-threshold recurrence events.
Observed events below height 262144 do not exclude an eventual defect cap of two.

second_order_defect_audit.retained_route: Prove a target-specific second-order recurrence theorem for the fixed logarithm ratio without dividing the additive defect by H.
second_order_defect_audit.candidate_theorem: FixedLogSecondOrderDefectRecurrence: Delta_H>=3 for infinitely many nested top-bit prefixes.
second_order_defect_audit.proof_boundary: TICKET92 preserves the exact constant-additive scale and rejects two target-erasing routes. It does not prove Delta_H>=3 infinitely often, 00 recurrence, or Collatz.
second_order_defect_audit.novelty_boundary: The second-order defect packaging is a candidate PrimeProject contribution pending independent review; p-adic logarithmic forms are established background.

attempts.obstruction: For every fixed additive defect Delta_H=O(1), mu_H tends to 1; Delta=1 and the required Delta>=3 have the same first-order limit.
attempts.candidate_theorem: FixedLogSecondOrderDefectRecurrence: Delta_H>=3 for infinitely many nested top-bit prefixes.
attempts.next_experiment: Build TICKET93 around a target-specific recurrence mechanism for Delta_H without first-order normalization.
attempts.claim_boundary: No Collatz proof and no certified divergent Collatz counterexample.

bounded_result.candidate_theorem: Preserve the additive representation margin after every exceptional-character error term.

attempts.obstruction: No target-specific second-order coordinate or infinite recurrence theorem was proved.

attempts.claim_boundary: No goldbach proof and no certified goldbach counterexample.

attempts.proof_or_counterexample_mode: primary-source criterion replay plus false bounded-gap promotion removal
attempts.attempt: Recheck the legacy TP-TICKET-14 M_k threshold against Maynard Proposition 4.2 before using it in exact-gap research.

criterion.maynard_proposition: The sieve yields at least ceil(theta*M_k/2) primes in an admissible k-tuple.
criterion.two_prime_threshold: A certified M_k>2/theta is required; in the theta->1/2 limit this means a strict certified M_k>4.
criterion.legacy_error: The former 2/k threshold and implied gap fields were not consequences of Maynard's criterion.

maynard_threshold_correction.discarded_route: Treat an unverified closed-form score above 2/k as a certified Maynard M_k threshold and convert tuple diameter into a proved gap.
maynard_threshold_correction.retained_route: Require an explicit test function F, rigorous I_k and J_k integrals, distribution hypotheses, and the exact theta*M_k/2 prime-count criterion; exact gap 2 still needs parity-breaking input.
maynard_threshold_correction.candidate_theorem: ParityBreakingExactPairCorrelationLowerBound: an unconditional lower bound for Lambda(n)Lambda(n+2) that cannot be reproduced by parity or wider-gap countermodels.
maynard_threshold_correction.proof_boundary: TICKET92 removes a false Maynard threshold and gap-2 promotion. It proves no new bounded-gap theorem and no Twin Prime result.

attempts.obstruction: Treat an unverified closed-form score above 2/k as a certified Maynard M_k threshold and convert tuple diameter into a proved gap.
attempts.candidate_theorem: ParityBreakingExactPairCorrelationLowerBound: an unconditional lower bound for Lambda(n)Lambda(n+2) that cannot be reproduced by parity or wider-gap countermodels.
attempts.next_experiment: Require a parity-breaking exact-pair correlation estimate rather than another bounded-gap surrogate.
attempts.claim_boundary: No Twin Prime proof and no certified last-twin counterexample.
